warps.notes: South entrance left tile — leads back to Bruno's Room
South entrance right tile — leads back to Bruno's Room
North exit left tile — leads to Lance's Room. Locked until Karen is defeated.
North exit right tile — leads to Lance's Room. Locked until Karen is defeated.

notes: Map is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall (5x9 blocks).
Karen stands at (5,7) facing down — center of the room.
The north door at y=2 (tiles 4,2 and 5,2) starts as wall ($2a block). Changes to open door ($16) after Karen is defeated.
The south entrance at y=14 (tile 4,14) is changed to wall ($2a) immediately upon player entry.
KarensRoom_EnterMovement walks the player UP 4 steps after entering.
Karen is the only Elite Four member who speaks philosophically about bonding with Pokemon over power-meta optimization.

trainers.name: Karen
trainers.intro_dialogue: I am KAREN of the ELITE FOUR. You're <PLAYER>? How amusing. I love dark-type Pokemon. I find their wild, tough image to be so appealing. And they're so strong. Think you can take them? Just try to entertain me. Let's go.
trainers.beaten_dialogue: Well, aren't you good. I like that in a trainer.
trainers.post_defeat_dialogue: Strong Pokemon. Weak Pokemon. That is only the selfish perception of people. Truly skilled trainers should try to win with their favorites. I like your style. You understand what's important. Go on--the CHAMPION is waiting.

events.name: LockDoorBehindPlayer
events.description: SCENE_KARENSROOM_LOCK_DOOR fires sdefer KarensRoomDoorLocksBehindYouScript. Player is walked UP 4 steps automatically, earthquake sound plays, and the south entrance door tile at (4,14) is changed to wall ($2a block). EVENT_KARENS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set. Scene changes to SCENE_KARENSROOM_NOOP.

events.name: OpenExitDoor
events.description: After Karen is beaten, EVENT_BEAT_ELITE_4_KAREN is set. The north door tiles at (4,2) and (5,2) change to open ($16 block). EVENT_KARENS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set. Player can then proceed to Lance's Room.

events.name: KarensRoomDoorsCallback
events.description: On every map tile refresh: if EVENT_KARENS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set, applies wall at (4,14). If EVENT_KARENS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set, applies open door at (4,2).

notes: Karen is Elite Four member #4, specializing in Dark-type Pokemon — a new type introduced in Gen 2 specifically to counter the Psychic type. Her team is the most diverse of the four, mixing Dark (Umbreon, Murkrow, Houndoom), Ghost (Gengar), and Grass/Poison (Vileplume) types. Umbreon (Lv.42) uses trapping moves (Mean Look) and confusion tactics. Gengar (Lv.45) is the most dangerous with Destiny Bond — if the player faints it, they also lose a Pokemon. Houndoom (Lv.47) is her ace. Her post-battle speech about using your favorites is one of the most-quoted lines in Pokemon history. Karen carries Full Heal and Max Potion. Prize money: $4700 (base 25 × highest level 47 × 4).
